title: Tendering Strategy Playbook
summary: Tendering success depends on realistic planning constraints and communication fallback.
fullContent: Carrier tender acceptance rates improve when pickup windows, transit assumptions, and SLA commitments are realistic and traceable.
importantPoints: Track rejection reasons for continuous tuning
consultantNotes: Start with limited pilot lanes before global rollout
realWorldExamples: A shipper reduced rejection by 22% after lane-specific pickup calibration
commonMistakes: Ignoring calendar mismatch between shipper and carrier
interviewQuestions: How do you design fallback tendering strategy in SAP TM?
